ops.body: 2026-07-19 W4b COMPLETE — hosted serving is viable and MORE faithful to training than local. Spike (Modal, ~$0.50 of the $10 cap, torn down verified): promoted v002 watcher PEFT adapter (staging watcher-ohmt8itj) served UNFUSED via vLLM --enable-lora on Qwen/Qwen3-8B @ pinned rev b968826d, bf16, A10G, scale-to-zero; scored the full 628-row frozen frame through the endpoint with byte-identical sentinel semantics (HF and MLX tokenizers produce identical (prefix_ids, sentinel) on all 628 rows — only model numerics differ). RESULTS: hosted AUC 0.92953 vs local 4-bit MLX 0.93169 (Δ -0.0022, parity; note the previously-quoted 0.9291 baseline was the REJECTED 07-16 candidate's served AUC — the promoted v002's stored probs give 0.93169). Fidelity: |vLLM−Tinker| median 0.0022 (max 0.031) vs |vLLM−MLX4bit| median 0.0251 (max 0.307) — bf16 hosted serves the model the training actually produced; the local 4-bit shifts mid-confidence rows (the documented quantization effect). CAVEAT (substrate-specific operating point): at thresholds.budget=7.07e-5 local fires 9 vs hosted 26 (607/628 decisions agree) — any cutover recalibrates the threshold on the served substrate's probs, which eval-what-you-serve already mandates. Latency: warm single-decision median 503ms; cold start 212s un-snapshotted (Modal memory snapshots would cut this to ~70s per the provider research); full frame at concurrency 16 = 318s on one A10G. Ops notes for a real deployment: pin vLLM (spike ran latest), CUDA-devel base required (FlashInfer JIT needs nvcc), LoRA fully vLLM-native (rank 32, 7 standard modules, no fusing). Artifacts: /tmp/cc-steer-modal-spike/ (frame.json, served_results.json, report.json, app+scorer sources). PROVIDER MATRIX + LATENCY BUDGET (research pass, journaled here for criterion 315ce642): no provider offers per-token custom-LoRA serverless as of mid-2026 — all custom-fine-tune routes are dedicated-GPU with scale-to-zero (Fireworks autoscale-to-0 w/ minutes-cold-start+503-retry; Together DMI ~1h inactivity shutdown; Baseten 30-min idle-to-zero; DeepInfra/Novita/Parasail GPU-hour). Serverless-GPU class wins for our ~30 req/day bursty duty cycle: Modal primary (measured 70s cold via GPU memory snapshots on a 27B repro; ~$39/mo gross at duty cycle largely offset by the $30/mo free tier; SOC2; first-class HF revision pinning), RunPod serverless secondary (L40S ~$11/mo gross but cold-start less characterized; FlashBoot only helps steady traffic). Daemon-side latency budget: tolerated ~60-120s (median trigger→next-prompt 123s over 2,959 real gaps; steer TTL 60min; freshest-wins), verdict fine_as_is — with the caveats that the drafter path needs an explicit HTTP timeout and a cold start stalls the single-threaded eval loop for its duration. Serving decision → user, options prepared.
